scope: zero-training attribution of the frozen factorized stoichiometry-first IID NLL miss

data.role: reproduce the exact train-internal 95/5 IID split; no validation row is used

evaluation.empirical_baseline: train-fit token frequency conditioned on node count, count-rank slot and current stoichiometric count, renormalized over the exact history-dependent legal support

decision_rule.initial_ratio_criterion_is_too_indirect_: Do not retroactively pass E1. Replace the random-initialization ratio only in a future versioned Gate with absolute conditional NLL and co-occurrence calibration; assignment remains blocked until that Gate is preregistered and passed.
decision_rule.conditional_species_law_underfit: The fixed checkpoint underfits the conditional species law; stop without adding steps or capacity and design one separately justified species-law mechanism before assignment.
decision_rule.mixed_nll_and_cooccurrence_evidence: Evidence is mixed; retain the E1 failure and do not alter architecture until the failing conditional strata are identified from the frozen group table.
decision_rule.boundary: This audit takes zero optimizer steps and cannot authorize assignment, L1/M1, tensor/oracle work, relaxation, DFT or DFPT.
